text.title: Terse Default Tool Output Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping tool type + measured worst-case output to an action. Leaves reference rules from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the tool's worst-case (p95) response > 500 tokens?

conclusion.verdict: skip; tool already compact; overhead exceeds savings

branch.question: Is the tool a final-result tool (last step of the loop) or an intermediate planning tool?

conclusion.verdict: default to full; agent / user wants the answer at the end of the loop

branch.question: Does each row have a stable primary key the agent can use to re-query?

conclusion.verdict: implement summary mode + format='full' opt-in + truncation flag
introduce a deterministic id (uuid or hash of canonical key) BEFORE applying this methodology

text.example: p95=3200 → q-tool-type: intermediate → q-key-available: row.id present → primary-key-in-summary; implement summary mode with id, ts, level, msg-headline + truncated/total_hits + reason on full.
